summary: Hardened plugin-managed agent source-of-truth: removed last anomalous agent prompt (librarian.md), stopped wholesale agents/ directory sync in copy-config.mjs, added pruneDeprecatedRuntimeAgentPrompts() that removes only known deprecated filenames while preserving user-custom agents, updated check-agents-drift.mjs to count named agents from oh-my-opencode.json config instead of filesystem, and corrected stale documentation in README.md and agents-list.md.
